title: RSW Christmas Cracker Set of 6 – Who Am I Game – Fun Family Party Crackers with Gonk Headbands & 24 Guessing Game Cards – 9" Crackers with Hat & Motto
features: FUN FAMILY CRACKERS – Box of 6 x 9-inch crackers featuring festive snowflake and star designs on midnight blue and white bases with red and white string ties
WHO AM I GAME INCLUDED – Comes with 6 gonk headbands and 24 game cards – perfect for interactive family fun and laughter around the Christmas table
CLASSIC CONTENTS – Each cracker contains a hat and motto for a traditional festive experience without loud noises
PERFECT FOR ALL AGES – Ideal for Christmas dinner, family parties and seasonal celebrations – keeps both kids and adults entertained
ECO-FRIENDLY CHOICE – Made with recyclable crackers and packaging and featuring plastic-free contents for a sustainable holiday season
description: Bring laughter and entertainment to your festive celebrations with this RSW Christmas Cracker Set of 6 featuring the popular “Who Am I?” game. These family-friendly crackers are designed with a festive snowflake and star pattern printed on midnight blue and white bases, each tied with classic red and white string. At 9 inches long, they make a perfect table decoration and a great way to kick off the fun on Christmas Day. Each cracker contains a paper hat and motto, plus this special set includes six gonk headbands and twenty-four “Who Am I?” game cards for a hilarious group guessing game. Simply wear the headband, attach a card, and let the questions and laughter begin as players try to guess who or what they are. It’s a brilliant activity for both kids and adults, helping to create unforgettable holiday memories. Made with recyclable materials and plastic-free gifts, these crackers are an eco-conscious choice for festive gatherings. Whether used for Christmas dinner, a holiday party, or a family get-together, this set is sure to entertain guests and add a cheerful touch to your seasonal celebrations. WARNING! DO NOT PULL INNER OUTSIDE PARTY CRACKER. PULL CRACKER AWAY FROM FACE. DO NOT PULL NEAR EYES OR EARS. PULL BOTH ENDS AT ARMS LENGTH FIRMLY AND SHARPLY. DO NOT REMOVE INNER. WARNING! Not suitable for children under 3 years due to small parts which could represent a choking hazard. Contents may include glass and items with functional sharp points or edges. Adult supervision is required. Items may fall from crackers whilst pulling.
